title: I-687, Application for Status as a Temporary Resident Under Section 245A of the Immigration and Nationality Act
description: Requests temporary resident status under INA section 245A where applicable.

fields.tooltip: 48. Signature of Person Preparing Form if Other Than Above (Sign below). Enter Preparer's Daytime Phone Number, with area code.
